debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_1
P : Type u_2
inst✝⁴ : NormedAddCommGroup V
inst✝³ : InnerProductSpace ℝ V
inst✝² : MetricSpace P
inst✝¹ : NormedAddTorsor V P
inst✝ : Fact (finrank ℝ V = 2)
⊢ ∃ c,
    0 < c ∧
      ∀ {n : ℕ},
        1 < n →
          ∀ {S : Finset P},
            S.card = n →
              ((↑S).Pairwise fun x y => 1 ≤ dist x y) →
                ∃ l,
                  finrank ℝ ↥l.direction = 1 ∧
                    (∃ p₁ p₂, p₁ ∈ S ∧ p₂ ∈ S ∧ l.SOppSide p₁ p₂) ∧ ∀ p ∈ S, c * ↑n ^ (-1 / 3) ≤ Metric.infDist p ↑l

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
use 2⁻²¹
  constructor
  · norm_num
  · intro n hn S hS hS_pair
    let D := S.sup fun p₁ ↦ S.sup fun p₂ ↦ dist p₁ p₂
    have hD_pos : 0 < D := by
      obtain ⟨p1, h1, p2, h2, h12⟩ := S.one_lt_card_iff.1 (hS.symm ▸ hn)
      exact (hS_pair h1 h2 h12).trans_lt' (by norm_num) |>.trans_le (Finset.le_sup h1 (Finset.le_sup h2 (by refl)))
    have hS_ne : S.Nonempty := by rw [← Finset.card_pos, hS]; exact hn.trans_lt' (by norm_num)
    let δ := 2⁻²¹ * (n : ℝ) ^ (-1 / 3 : ℝ)
    by_cases hD : D ≥ (n : ℝ) ^ (2 / 3 : ℝ) / 2
    · obtain ⟨p1, h1, p2, h2, hdist⟩ := S.exists_mem_max_image (fun p1 ↦ S.sup fun p2 ↦ dist p1 p2) hS_ne
      obtain ⟨p3, h3, hdist2⟩ := S.exists_mem_max_image (fun p2 ↦ dist p1 p2) hS_ne
      rw [hdist] at hdist2; clear hdist
      let v := (1 / dist p1 p3) • (p3 -ᵥ p1)
      have hv : ‖v‖ = 1 := by rw [norm_smul, norm_inv, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg dist_nonneg, inv_mul_cancel (hD_pos.trans_le (Finset.le_sup h1 (Finset.le_sup h3 (by refl)))).ne.symm]
      let proj := fun p : P ↦ inner (p -ᵥ p1) v
      let S' := S.image proj
      have hS'_card : #S' ≤ n := (Finset.card_image_le).trans hS.le
      let sorted := S'.sort (· ≤ ·)
      have hsorted_len : sorted.length = #S' := S'.length_sort (· ≤ ·)
      have hgap : ∃ i < sorted.length - 1, sorted.get ⟨i + 1, by omega⟩ - sorted.get ⟨i, by omega⟩ ≥ 2 * δ := by
        by_contra! hg
        have hrange : sorted.get ⟨sorted.length - 1, by omega⟩ - sorted.get ⟨0, by omega⟩ < (n - 1) * (2 * δ) := by
          have : sorted.get ⟨sorted.length - 1, by omega⟩ - sorted.get ⟨0, by omega⟩ = ∑ i in Finset.range (sorted.length - 1), (sorted.get ⟨i + 1, by omega⟩ - sorted.get ⟨i, by omega⟩) := by
            rw [Finset.sum_range_get_succ_sub]
          rw [this]; refine (Finset.sum_lt_sum (fun _ _ ↦ hg _ _) (by use 0; omega)).trans_le ?_
          simp only [Finset.card_range, smul_eq_mul, hsorted_len]; gcongr; omega
        have hmax : sorted.get ⟨sorted.length - 1, by omega⟩ - sorted.get ⟨0, by omega⟩ ≥ D := by
          obtain ⟨qa, ha, qb, hb, hDq⟩ := S.exists_mem_max_image (fun p1 ↦ S.sup fun p2 ↦ dist p1 p2) hS_ne
          obtain ⟨qc, hc, hDqc⟩ := S.exists_mem_max_image (fun p2 ↦ dist qa p2) hS_ne
          rw [hDq] at hDqc; have : dist qa qc = D := hDqc
          have h1_in : proj p1 ∈ S' := Finset.mem_image_of_mem _ h1
          have h3_in : proj p3 ∈ S' := Finset.mem_image_of_mem _ h3
          have : proj p3 - proj p1 = D := by
            simp [proj, inner_smul_right, inner_direction_vsub_self, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq]
            field_simp [hDqc.symm]; rw [sq, mul_inv_cancel_left (hD_pos.trans_le (Finset.le_sup h1 (Finset.le_sup h3 (by refl)))).ne.symm]
            exact this
          rw [← this]; exact (List.min_le_get _ _).trans (List.get_le_max _ _)
        linarith [hD, hrange, δ]
      obtain ⟨i, hi, hg⟩ := hgap
      let d := (sorted.get ⟨i, by omega⟩ + sorted.get ⟨i + 1, by omega⟩) / 2
      let l := AffineSubspace.mk' p1 (Subspace.orthogonal (Submodule.span ℝ {v}))
      have hdim : finrank ℝ l.direction = 1 := by
        simp [l, direction_mk', Subspace.finrank_orthogonal, finrank_span_singleton (by n_obs; exact hv.ne_zero)]
        exact Fact.out (p := finrank ℝ V = 2)
      use l, hdim
      constructor
      · obtain ⟨p1', h1', hp1'⟩ := Finset.mem_image.1 (List.mem_sort.1 (List.get_mem _ _ _))
        obtain ⟨p2', h2', hp2'⟩ := Finset.mem_image.1 (List.mem_sort.1 (List.get_mem _ _ _))

          simp [proj, Subspace.norm_orthogonal_projection_orthogonal, Submodule.mem_span_singleton, hv]

        have h2d : d < proj p2' := by rw [hp2']; linarith

        · have : sorted.get ⟨i + 1, by omega⟩ ≤ sorted.get ⟨j, by omega⟩ := by apply this; omega

    · have h_le_n : n ≤ 1 := by linarith [hD, hS_ne, hn]
